paper_title: Localization and Experimental Conditions in Pollen Studies

methods.description: This method involves collecting pollen from various environments to study the effects of pollution on pollen and plants. It includes passive exposure and transplantation methods to assess pollution patterns and eliminate confounding factors.

steps.description: Collect pollen from polluted zones (e.g., town centers, roadsides) and control zones (e.g., rural suburbs, mountainous areas).
steps.searchable_summary: collect pollen samples from different environmental zones

steps.description: Use transects along specific roads or altitudes to collect pollen samples.
Expose pollen material in polluted and control zones using small bags or containers.
steps.searchable_summary: expose pollen in different zones using containers

methods.method_name: Detection of Pollen-Derived Particles and Free Allergens
methods.description: This method involves detecting subparticles and aeroallergens in urban polluted air using technical devices like high-volume samplers and surface plasmon resonance technology.

steps.description: Use Andersen high-volume sampler to collect size-segregated particles on quartz fiber filters.
steps.searchable_summary: collect airborne particles using high-volume sampler

steps.description: Use surface plasmon resonance technology to detect atmospheric allergens through monoclonal antibodies binding.
steps.searchable_summary: detect allergens using surface plasmon resonance

methods.description: This method involves exposing allergic and asthmatic individuals to gases and particulate matter to study the effects on allergic responses.

steps.description: Expose subjects to NO2 in an exposure chamber and measure bronchial response to allergens.
steps.searchable_summary: expose subjects to NO2 and measure bronchial response

steps.description: Expose subjects to O3 and measure changes in bronchia responsiveness to allergens.
steps.searchable_summary: expose subjects to O3 and measure bronchia responsiveness

steps.description: Expose subjects to SO2 and VOCs and measure skin prick test reactivity.
steps.searchable_summary: expose subjects to SO2 and VOCs and measure skin prick test
